subcodes.first_line: O thou physician of the hearts of the friends! For some time no salutation, no message, no letter, nor any trace hath come from thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب قلوب دوستان مدتیست که از شما نه سلامی و نه پیامی و نه نامه و نه نقش
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @business; financial; property matters, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
